case_title: CARLOS MOISES VANEGAS VS. RUBEN CRUZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VANEGAS, CARLOS MOISES AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, RUBEN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANEGAS, CARLOS MOISES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, RUBEN AN INDIVIDUAL $9,798.84 PRINCIPAL, $33.50 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,057.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
